flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Monroe Community College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (22.5% vs 28.1%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Monroe Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.3% → 0.0%).
